paths.@runtime: src/core/* must not import from @runtime/* — violates architectural boundary. Use a port/type in @core/* and let @runtime/* implement.
paths.@persistence: src/core/* must not import from @persistence/* — violates architectural boundary. Use a port/type in @core/* and let @persistence/* implement.

paths.@orchestrator: src/core/* must not import from @orchestrator/* — violates architectural boundary. Use a port/type in @core/* and let @orchestrator/* implement.
paths.@agents: src/core/* must not import from @agents/* — violates architectural boundary. Use a port/type in @core/* and let @agents/* implement.
paths.@app: src/core/* must not import from @app/* — violates architectural boundary. Use a port/type in @core/* and let @app/* implement.
